mapper.select:
SELECT m.seq, m.name, m.phone_number AS phoneNumber, m.level, m.language, m.info, m.chart_number AS chartNumber, m.comment, m.join_date AS joinDate, m.signup_channel AS signupChannel, m.interviewer, m.created_date AS createdDate, m.last_update_date AS lastUpdateDate FROM complex_members m
ORDER BY m.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
